title: Fat Freezing in Malta: What It Is, How It Works, and What to Realistically Expect

body_text:
If you have been quietly researching fat freezing in Malta, you are not the only one. Maybe you have been eating well, moving when you can, doing everything you were told would work — and there is still that one area that will not budge. That is not a lack of effort. That is not a failure. Some pockets of fat are simply resistant to diet and exercise, and understanding that is the first step towards doing something about it. Fat freezing, clinically known as cryolipolysis, has become one of the most requested non-surgical treatments in Malta precisely because it addresses this frustration without surgery, without downtime, and without anyone needing to know.

[Image: CoolSculpting]

How Fat Freezing Works — The Science Made Simple
Fat cells are more sensitive to cold than the surrounding tissue. During a CoolSculpting session, a specialised applicator draws in the targeted area and cools it to a precise temperature — cold enough to crystallise and permanently destroy fat cells, but gentle enough to leave your skin, nerves, and muscles completely unaffected. Over the following weeks, your body naturally processes and eliminates these damaged cells through your lymphatic system. The fat cells do not return. Once they are gone, they are gone.

What makes fat freezing different from dieting is that it reduces the actual number of fat cells in a specific area — typically by 20 to 25 per cent per session. Dieting only shrinks fat cells; it never removes them. That is why stubborn areas tend to bounce back after every attempt. At Carisma Slimming in St Julian's, every fat freezing treatment is overseen by our medical team with over 30 years of clinical experience. This is not a beauty salon add-on — it is a doctor-led, clinical-grade procedure.

What the Treatment Feels Like
First few minutes: an intense cold sensation and pulling pressure as the applicator suctions the area

After 10 minutes: the area goes numb and most patients relax, read, or use their phone

Treatment duration: 35-60 minutes per area

After removal: a brief massage to break up crystallised cells (this can feel intense but passes quickly)

Common treatment areas: abdomen, flanks, inner thighs, outer thighs, upper arms, double chin

Downtime: none — return to your normal activities immediately

Results timeline: visible changes from week 4, full results by week 8-12

Let us be honest about what it feels like, because nobody benefits from vague promises. The first few minutes are uncomfortable. Then the numbness sets in and the rest of the session is genuinely relaxing. Afterwards, you may have some redness, mild swelling, or tingling for a few days — all normal and temporary.

Take the First Step — On Your Terms
At Carisma Slimming, every journey begins with a doctor-led consultation where we assess your body composition, discuss your goals honestly, and build a plan that makes sense for your body and your life. No pressure. No upselling. Just clarity. Our CoolSculpting Starter Pack is currently €199 (reduced from €625) and includes three fat freezing sessions, four spa and fitness access passes, a full body composition analysis, and a €25 aesthetics credit.
